message:
fix(journal,core,repair): correct fast commit dentry parsing and harden error paths

Fast commit Create/Link/Unlink operations parsed dentry names using a
fabricated name_len byte that doesn't exist in the ext4_fc_dentry_info
struct. Byte 8 was treated as name_len when it's actually the first
character of the filename. Unlink also read ino incorrectly (always 0).
Fixed all three to match the kernel format: parent_ino(4) + ino(4) +
dname[](rest of payload, length from TLV tag).

Also fixes: borrow checker error in ext4_write_compressed deferred block
freeing (destructure alloc for split borrows), clippy lint suppressions
for collect_old_cluster_blocks and ext4_write_compressed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
